column1: # Table 3. Table of genetic diversity metrics for populations of Physaria globosa and related species.

# Column definitions: Population=population or species grouping; Geographic area=abbreviated sampling region; n=number of individuals; A=average alleles per locus; AR=allelic richness; AP=private alleles per population; Ho=observed heterozygosity; He=expected heterozygosity; F=fixation index; % null=percentage of null alleles; FB=fixation index adjusted for null alleles
# Note: Region codes: IN=Indiana, MO=Missouri, KY=Kentucky, TNE=eastern Tennessee / Nashville Basin, TNW=western Tennessee / Highland Rim, EX-S=ex situ populations.
# Note: * Indicates populations reported in the manuscript as having experienced significant genetic bottlenecks.
